title: Auri's Extras
description: Auri's Extras is a collection of simple, intuitive crafting recipes that blend seamlessly with Vanilla Minecraft. Each addition fills a small gap — the kind you didn’t know you needed until it was there. No fluff, just the quality-of-life tweaks that make
body:
Auri's Extras is a collection of simple, intuitive crafting recipes that blend seamlessly with Vanilla Minecraft. Each addition fills a small gap — the kind you didn’t know you needed until it was there. No fluff, just the quality-of-life tweaks that make crafting feel complete.

Recipes:

- Coal to Black Dye
- Smelt/Blast Full Quartz Block Variants back into the Basic Quartz Block
- Unpack Blue Ice
- Unpack Packed Ice
- Unpack Dripstone
- Unpack Nether Wart Blocks
- Unpack Wool into String
- Alternative Dispenser Recipes
- Alternate Chest Recipe
- Renewable Sand
- Spore Blossom Recipe
- Name Tag Recipe
- Saddle Recipe
- Rotten Flesh to Leather - Uses a Campfire/Soul Campfire
- Raw Ore Block Smelting
- Alternate Powered Rail Recipe


  
  **All Recipes can be found in the Gallery Section**


Please Report any Bugs to the Auris Extras Channel in my discord.
